events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: window pan flashing absent. Work is rough-complete. IRC R703 requires flashing around windows and doors to prevent water intrusion. Missing pan flashing is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (water intrusion potential). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: rough-complete maybe 70%. Confidence high.
